center.name: 卡萨纳雷省
center.summary: 卡萨纳雷省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Dusky spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central Colombia's Eastern Andes in southern Casanare Department and northwestern Meta Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in central Colombia's Eastern Andes in southern Casanare Department and northwestern Meta Department
